task_completion.description: Navigate to the legislative page for H.R. 4346 (117th Congress)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the official legislative page (e.g., Congress.gov) for H.R. 4346, the CHIPS and Science Act from the 117th Congress.

task_completion.description: Locate and access the Enrolled Bill PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser or PDF viewer displaying the official 'Enrolled Bill' (final version) text of H.R. 4346.

task_completion.description: Save the Enrolled Bill PDF to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or save dialog showing the file 'chips_act_final.pdf' located in '/home/ga/Documents/Legislation/'.

task_completion.description: Find the voting record for House Vote Roll No. 404
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the official roll call vote record for House Vote #404 on July 28, 2022, displaying the Yeas and Nays.

task_completion.description: Record the vote details in a text file at the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of 'vote_tally.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/Legislation/', containing the date (July 28, 2022), Roll Call number (404), Yeas (243), and Nays (187).

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to search for and view the legislative information
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively using a web browser to navigate Congress.gov or similar sites, rather than relying on internal knowledge.

integrity.description: Agent downloaded the actual PDF rather than creating a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: The PDF file should be downloaded from the browser, and if opened, should display the actual legislative text, not be an empty or fabricated file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass research
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not simply use 'echo' or a python script with hardcoded values to create the text file without first looking up the vote tally online.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Bill: H.R. 4346 (117th Congress). Vote Date: July 28, 2022 (2022-07-28). Vote Roll: 404. Yeas: 243. Nays: 187. Expected PDF path: /home/ga/Documents/Legislation/chips_act_final.pdf. Expected Tally path: /home/ga/Documents/Legislation/vote_tally.txt.
